description: Triggers when the user needs to create, validate, or manage wikilinks in an Obsidian vault

queries.query: add wikilinks to this meeting note for all the people and projects mentioned
find all broken links in my Obsidian vault
which notes in my vault have no incoming links?
convert all mentions of Deep Work to wikilinks in this note
link the strategy note to the OKR tracker
build a map of content for all my product management notes
I renamed Project Alpha to Initiative Orion, update all wikilinks
create a block reference to this paragraph in my meeting notes
show me all notes that link to the Team Goals page
check my Research hub for broken wikilinks
summarize this YouTube video about productivity
create a mermaid flowchart for the login process
optimize my resume for ATS
add frontmatter tags and aliases to this note
create an Excalidraw whiteboard for the system design
write a Python script to read JSON files
what is the best note-taking system for students?
transcribe this audio recording to markdown
analyze the competitive landscape for my product
generate a cover letter for this job application
